features: „ÄêIn Ear Design With Passive Noise IsolationSoft„Äësilicone tips seal gently in your ears to block more outside noise and keep the sound focused. The secure in ear fit helps the earbuds stay in place when you walk, commute or move around, giving stable, comfortable listening for music, podcasts and audiobooks.

„ÄêPowerful Sound With Enhanced Bass„ÄëTuned in ear drivers deliver clear mids and strong low frequencies so beats, vocals and instruments sound more vivid. These wireless earbuds are suitable for pop, rock, dance and everyday playlists, giving more impact and energy than many open fit headphones.

„ÄêAll Day Battery Life With Charging Case„ÄëLong lasting battery lets you listen for hours on a single charge, then top up your earbuds in the compact charging case between uses. Ideal for work days, commuting, travel and study, so you can keep your wireless earphones ready from morning to night without worrying about frequent charging.

„ÄêReliable Wireless Connection„ÄëUpdated bluetooth chip offers fast pairing and a more stable connection between the earbuds and your phone, tablet or laptop. Enjoy smoother audio when you watch videos, scroll social media or play casual games, with fewer dropouts compared with older wireless headphones.

„ÄêEasy Controls And Hands Free Calls„ÄëSimple touch controls let you play or pause music, skip tracks and answer or end calls without taking out your device. The built in microphone supports everyday phone calls at home or on the go, and the earbuds work with most smartphones, tablets and other bluetooth devices.
